name: cueline
description: Use a ChatGPT web conversation as the text controller for durable local advice or explicitly claimed work executed by the current Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Let ChatGPT Pro direct durable local agent runs.
interface.longDescription: CueLine lets a ChatGPT web conversation issue validated text commands while the current Codex executes caller-mode advice or an explicitly selected process executor runs registered workers, with durable recovery evidence.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $cueline to let the open ChatGPT conversation direct this task.
